patterns.title: Error Retrieving Pull/Merge Requests (GitLab GraphQL API)
patterns.rootCause: GitLab GraphQL API does not recognize fields 'detailedMergeStatus' on type 'MergeRequest' and 'commitEmail' on type 'MergeRequestReviewer'. This indicates a GIJ version / GitLab version mismatch.
patterns.frequency: Every reindex cycle (~10 minutes), once per repository
patterns.errorMessageTemplate: Error retrieving pull/merge requests for the repository '<repo_name>' (repoId=<id>)
patterns.stackTrace:
com.bigbrassband.jira.git.exceptions.external.WrappedGitlabAPIException: External service error
	at com.bigbrassband.jira.git.services.integration.gitlab.CachedGitLabApi.getMergeRequestsCreatedAt(CachedGitLabApi.java:236)
	... (full trace here)

patterns.title: Error Updating Repository (Object Too Large)
patterns.rootCause: Repository contains a ~3.7 GB object exceeding JGit's ~2.1 GB limit.
patterns.errorMessageTemplate: Error updating the repository 'data-sage/Midas - New Level Distribution - ML' (repoId=93093)

patterns.title: Error During .git Clone Attempt
patterns.affectedRepos: Unidentified (no repo name). Correlated with data-sage/Midas repository based on 1:1 timing match with Pattern 2.
patterns.exception: No stack trace — descriptive error only
patterns.rootCause: Clone attempt fails after fetch error. The 1:1 correlation with Pattern 2 confirms same repository.
patterns.frequency: Every reindex cycle (~10 minutes), always following Pattern 2
patterns.stackTrace:
Error during .git clone attempt
    Possible reasons:
       - Repository URL is invalid. Check URL.
       - Your SSH key has permissions to the Git server, but does not have access to the repository.
       - Connection to Git server timed out.
       - The repository has been disabled on the Git service side.

notes.label: Velocity Allowlisting Warnings
notes.text: Numerous WARN-level messages matching 'VelocityHelper' and 'Method needs allowlisting' were present. These are Jira debug-mode noise and have been excluded.

notes.label: Pattern 2 & 3 Correlation
notes.text: The 'Error updating repository' and 'Error during .git clone attempt' always appear as a pair. Both occur exactly 71 times with matching timing.
